description: Edit tool — 3-param string replacement; does the model supply path, old_str, new_str correctly?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Use the edit tool to modify files.
In the file config.py, replace the line 'DEBUG = False' with 'DEBUG = True'.

function.name: edit
function.description: Replace an exact string in a file (first occurrence).

expect.notes: Check all three params present; old_str and new_str are the critical observation points
